---
title: "Jenny Höglauer"
image: images/jenny.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/JennyHoeglauer
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:jenny.hoeglauer@outlook.com
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jenny-h%C3%B6glauer-62b429254/
---

## Welcome to my Portfolio!

I am Jenny Höglauer, a Double Degree student in **Global Business Studies** at Dublin City University, Ireland and **International Management** at ESB Business School, Germany.

With a strong interest in finance, strategy and data analytics, I enjoy working at the intersection of business and technology — turning complex data into structured insights that support decision-making.

This portfolio showcases my academic projects, professional experience and personal development — from machine learning and entrepreneurship to international business and beyond.

Feel free to explore my work and get in touch!
